summary: Core login controls are present, but the artifact contains duplicate password elements, weak or brittle locators, and inconsistent semantic naming. Some elements are misclassified and naming should better reflect business intent.

issues.message: Two elements represent the same password field using different locators (placeholder and id). This creates ambiguity and maintenance risk.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep a single password element using the stronger locator 'id=password' and remove the placeholder-based duplicate.

issues.message: The password element is classified as 'textbox' even though it is clearly a password input field.
issues.suggested_fix: Change the element type to 'password' to better reflect the control type and improve semantic clarity.

issues.message: The element name exposes the control type and uses an inconsistent naming pattern compared to the rest of the artifact.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename the element to 'username_field' to keep naming semantic and consistent with other elements.

issues.message: The locator uses placeholder text which can change due to localization or UI updates.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a more stable attribute such as aria-labelledby='ion-input-0-lbl'.

issues.message: The locator depends on icon aria-label or visible text which may not be stable for Ion components and may not always be exposed in the DOM.
issues.suggested_fix: Use a more stable positional locator such as xpath=(//ion-fab-button)[last()] based on observed layout.

issues.message: The locator relies on icon aria-label or visible text which may not reliably exist for Ion icons.
issues.suggested_fix: Use positional locator xpath=(//ion-fab-button)[1] which aligns with the page layout.

issues.message: The name is slightly verbose and tied to icon semantics rather than user intent.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename to 'back_button' for cleaner and more reusable naming.

approved_elements.name: username_field
approved_elements.description: Input field where the user enters their username.

approved_elements.name: password_field
approved_elements.description: Password input field used for authentication.

approved_elements.name: sign_in_button
approved_elements.description: Primary button used to submit login credentials.

approved_elements.name: back_button
approved_elements.description: Floating button that navigates back to the home page.

approved_elements.name: home_button
approved_elements.description: Floating button that navigates directly to the home page.
